Jeanette begins with 3 objects. Each week she adds 2 more.  
She practices for 5 weeks total. The pattern continues weekly.  
* * *  
Week one has 3 objects. Week two adds 2 more.  
Week three has 5 objects total. Week four adds another 2.  
* * *  
Week five ends with 9 objects. The total is now 9.  
Jeanette improves each week steadily. Her skill grows over time.
